info.title: GoACH
info.description: Connect to the GoACH platform via API/

tags.name: ACH Transactions
tags.description: Everything to do with actual ACH Transactions

tags.name: ACH Recurrences
tags.description: Everything to do with recurring transaction schedules

tags.name: Bank Accounts
tags.description: Managing the receiving bank accounts i.e. Clients Accounts

tags.name: Originator ACH Accounts
tags.description: Viewing info on the originating bank accounts i.e. Your Accounts

tags.name: Receivers
tags.description: Managing the info about the receiving account i.e. Your Clients

limit.name: limit
limit.description: maximum number of results to return at a time- max 100

pointer.name: pointer
pointer.description: When more results are available than the limit - a pointer is the UUID of the first returned object

start_date.description: Start Date to search by - mm/dd/yyyy

end_date.name: end_date
end_date.description: End Date to search by - mm/dd/yyyy

date.name: date
date.description: Specific Date to search by - mm/dd/yyyy

get.description: All ACH Recurrences the user has access to

401.description: Unauthorized - Confirm your API Key is correct

400.description: Error occured while creating ACH Transaction - correct the errors in the response and resubmit.

401.description: Unauthorized - Confirm your API Key is correct

404.description: Not Found - Unable to find related record.

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: Schedule modifier - i.e. every 1st day || every 2nd day

parameters.name: unit
parameters.description:
Daily will create a transaction every INTERVAL day including weekends.
          Weekly will create a transaction every INTERVAL week on every day in the day_array.
          Monthly will create a transaction every INTERVAL month on every day contained in the day_array.

parameters.name: days
parameters.description:
0 - 6 for Weekly -- 1-31 for Monthly -- For Last day of the month can add -1
          Required if unit is Weekly or Monthly. List of days of UNIT to create transactions on.

parameters.name: total_paid
parameters.description:
Required if end_type is set to total_amount_paid_on_recurrence or total_amount_paid_on_receiver.
          Total amount the recurrence should debit.

parameters.name: number_of_occurrences
parameters.description:
Required if end_type is set to end_after_occurrences.
          Total times transactions should be created on receiving account

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Schedule end date - Only needed when end_type == "end_date"

parameters.name: is_active
parameters.description: Is the schedule active or disabled?

parameters.name: include_bank_holidays
parameters.description:
Should the schedule create a transaction on a bank holiday?
        Note it will not actually be originated until the following business day.

parameters.name: poa_file
parameters.description: POA file, can be an image(png|jpg|jpeg|webp) or a PDF. Required if amount exceeds POA required amount from settings.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: UUID of ACH Recurrence to fetch

401.description: Unauthorized - Confirm your API Key is correct

put.description: Update an existing ACH Recurrence. By default will not effect any transactions already created by this scheduler.

400.description: Error occurred while modifying the ACH Recurrence - correct the errors in the response and resubmit.

401.description: Unauthorized - Confirm your API Key is correct

404.description: Not Found - Unable to find record with that ID.

parameters.description: UUID of ACH Recurrence to update

parameters.name: create_transaction
parameters.description: Create a new transaction immediately on this new schedule?

parameters.name: cancel_last
parameters.description: Cancel Last transaction created by this recurrence?

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: Schedule modifier - i.e. every 1st day || every 2nd day

parameters.name: unit
parameters.description:
Daily will create a transaction every INTERVAL day including weekends.
          Weekly will create a transaction every INTERVAL week on every day in the day_array.
          Monthly will create a transaction every INTERVAL month every day in the day_array.

parameters.name: days
parameters.description:
0 - 6 for Weekly -- 1-31 for Monthly -- For Last day of the month can add -1
          Required if unit is Weekly or Monthly. List of days of UNIT to create transactions on.

parameters.name: total_paid
parameters.description:
Required if end_type is set to total_amount_paid_on_recurrence or total_amount_paid_on_receiver.
          Total amount the recurrence should debit.

parameters.name: number_of_occurrences
parameters.description:
Required if end_type is set to end_after_occurrences.
          Total times transactions should be created on receiving account

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Schedule end date - Only needed when end_type == "end_date"

parameters.name: is_active
parameters.description: Is the schedule active or disabled?

parameters.name: include_bank_holidays
parameters.description:
Should the schedule create a transaction on a bank holiday?
        Note it will not actually be originated until the following business day.

parameters.description: Attempt to cancel last transaction created by Recurrence
